name: Magnesium Sulfate (MgSO4)
description: Niyad-jabka CNS iyo anticonvulsant loo isticmaalo ka-hortagga iyo daawaynta qalalka eclamptic ( suuxdinta uurka ee ka timid pre-eclampsia). Sidoo kale loo isticmaalo neefta daran iyo torsades de pointes. Safka koowaad ee eclampsia ee ka sarreeya benzodiazepines.
indications: Eclampsia (ka-hortagga suuxdinta iyo daawaynta ka hor-eclampsia daran)
Torsades de Pointes (polymorphic V-tach ka hypomagnesemia)
dose: Qiyaasta qaadista Eclampsia: 4-6g IV riix tartiib ah 20 daqiiqo. Dayactirka: 1-2g/saac faleebo IV ah. Haddii suuxdintu soo noqoto: 2-4g IV in ka badan 5 daqiiqo. Soo dejinta IM (haddii IV la waayo): 5g IM badhida kasta (wadarta 10g) isku mar.
window: Ka bilow bilawga suuxdintu ama marka la ogaado astaamaha cudurka pre-eclampsia daran.
contraindications: Kelyaha oo guuldarraystay (wuxuu ururiyaa -- dhimista qiyaasta)
warnings: Calaamadaha sunta: luminta reflex patellar (calaamada kowaad, 7-10 mEq/L), niyad-jabka neefsashada (> 10 mEq/L), wadnaha oo istaaga (> 15 mEq/L).
La soco falcelinta patellar 15kii daqiiqoba -- luminta falcelinta = joojinta faleebada.
Kahortaga sunta: Calcium gluconate 1g IV in ka badan 3 daqiiqo.
Iska yaree qiyaasta daciifnimada kelyaha -- la soco wax soo saarka kaadida.

pediatric.dose: Torsades: 25-50 mg/kg IV in ka badan 10-20 daqiiqo (ugu badnaan 2g). Neefta daran: 25-75 mg/kg IV (ugu badnaan 2g).
pediatric.note: Si dhif ah loo isticmaalo qalalka ee bukaanada aan umulaha ahayn ee carruurta --eclampsia waa calaamadda koowaad.

obstetric.note: Tilmaamaha aasaasiga ah. Ka gudubta mandheerta -- hypermagnesemia ee dhallaanka oo suurtagal ah. Qiyaasta dhallaanka haddii niyad-jabka neefsashada: calcium gluconate 100 mg/kg IV. U sheeg kooxda NICU isticmaalka magnesium ee hooyada.

source: JTS CPG: Obstetric Emergencies / Eclampsia Management Guidelines / ACOG
